calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Off Calendar

Notice And Application For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332. Telephone #415 250 2926.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB, a federal savings bank; American Express Centurion Bank, a Utah State Chartered Bank.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ADI COHEN SIMHAYOF, aka ADI C. SIMAYOF, aka ADI SIMHAYOF, aka ADI L SIHATOP, aka ADI S. COHEN, an individual; SIMAYOF, INC., a California Corporation.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $27,962.49
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $515.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $28,477.49
Judgment signed in open court.
